hook: Many active women mistake energy deficiency for normal fatigue.

script.hook: Did you know that many active women live with energy deficiency without realizing it?
beats: Energy deficiency, known as RED-S, affects not just elite athletes but anyone who underfuels during training.
Research shows that symptoms like irregular periods and fatigue can appear before significant bone loss.
The threshold for harm is lower than most people think — under 30 kcal per kg of fat-free mass can be risky.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.
